$comment: tctc-mcp example config for Sepolia. Primary roles point at the tctc-mcp demo deployment (2026-07-06): TCTCDemoToken (ERC-721 + ERC-7303) 0xa52fe39D0de852e88488faa34e723E861D0b09BD gated by AgentControlTokens (soulbound, issuer-burnable ERC-1155) 0x12342A7F0190B3AF3F4b47546D34006EDA54eE0B, owner = 0x31F8FDf2BA077c0f39852b6daAE028a5A7475d03. COMPLEX_* roles point at the original TCTC reference deployment MyComplexToken 0x0b57d5752f35071ad47c4448a2e106757a111835 (read-only showcase of OR semantics; its ControlTokens are not issuer-burnable — see MCP_SERVER_SPEC.md §5.5).

MINTER_ROLE.description: May call safeMint() on TCTCDemoToken (0xa52fe39D0de852e88488faa34e723E861D0b09BD). Held by owning MinterCert: AgentControlTokens typeId 1 (soulbound).

BURNER_ROLE.description: May call burn() on TCTCDemoToken (0xa52fe39D0de852e88488faa34e723E861D0b09BD). Held by owning BurnerCert: AgentControlTokens typeId 2 (soulbound).

COMPLEX_MINTER_ROLE.description: MINTER_ROLE of MyComplexToken (0x0b57d5752f35071ad47c4448a2e106757a111835): held by owning typeId 1 on ANY of three ERC-1155 control tokens (OR semantics). Note: safeMint() additionally requires COMPLEX_MEMBER_ROLE (AND at the target contract).

COMPLEX_MEMBER_ROLE.description: MEMBER_ROLE of MyComplexToken: held by owning any token of the ERC-721 membership contract 0x60cB707898Eb9F0F6fb71701C76B29d130C9A4A8.

COMPLEX_BURNER_ROLE.description: BURNER_ROLE of MyComplexToken: held by owning typeId 2 on ANY of the same three ERC-1155 control tokens.
